response.overview: After firefighter Luke Parker dies while saving a family from a house fire, his young widow Erin falls into a downward spiral of alcoholism and depression. But when David, the teen Luke lost his life saving, has a chance encounter with Erin and sees how the loss is affecting her, he hatches a plan to resurrect Luke for three days using a spell from his little sister's favorite comic book.
response.tagline: After his heroic death, a man finds out he gets three days to see his wife one more time and must help her move on and live her life.
response.title: Anybody
